name: Solidus Milestone M2 - Stripe Core APIs
description: Deliver Stripe customer, payment method, charge, and subscription lifecycle APIs with parity-focused behavior.

userStories.title: Implement Stripe customer service
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reliable create, retrieve, and update customer flows so app records stay aligned with Stripe.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement create, retrieve, and update customer API logic
Pass Stripe test-mode integration tests for create and update flows

userStories.title: Implement payment method management
userStories.description: As a developer, I want add, update, default, and detach payment method flows so customers can manage billing sources safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement add, update, and default payment method logic
Persist normalized payment method summary plus raw payload
Pass integration tests for default method switching and detached method cleanup
Publish cookbook example for SetupIntent plus attach flow

userStories.title: Implement charges and refunds APIs
userStories.description: As a product engineer, I want one-time payments and refund operations so apps can support complete payment flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement charge, authorize, capture, and refund APIs
Persist receipt URL, tax fields, refund totals, and payment method snapshots
Wrap Stripe exceptions into Solidus error types
Pass integration tests for successful charge, failed charge, partial refund, and multiple refunds
Publish error handling and retry guidance

userStories.title: Implement subscription lifecycle APIs
userStories.description: As a SaaS team, I want full subscription lifecycle controls so pricing and access states remain accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement create, cancel, cancelNow, resume, swap, changeQuantity, pause, and unpause operations
Implement subscription state helpers and billing period calculations
Implement retry failed payment and open invoice payment helpers
Pass integration tests for lifecycle transitions and SCA-required transitions
